name: Unnop (Tee) Sricharoenchai
thesis: I already built the platform you're setting out to build and I run the 5,300 person volunteer community it serves. A production, multi-tenant operating system for movement organizations: membership, document e-signing, budget approval, outreach, and casework on one shared core. Here are some recent portfolio highlights, and a working reference implementation you can explore [https://canva.link/fmwq6u3k3ct1r3x](https://canva.link/fmwq6u3k3ct1r3x)
profile: A developer who found his way into politics and into building the tools that organizing runs on. For six years I've coordinated for Ratchaburi's People's Party and grown its volunteer community of 5,300 on Discord, so I understand how an organization actually works, and how a community is built, from the inside. Making an organization's work easier through software is my real passion from [homeschoolnetwork.org](https://homeschoolnetwork.org), which turned homeschool assessment reporting into something simple, to [pplevolunteers.org](https://pplevolunteers.org), the party's own operations platform.

work.heading: A community, and the platform that runs it
work.lead: I run the party's 5,300 person volunteer community on Discord and I built the platform that powers it. [pplevolunteers.org](https://pplevolunteers.org) is a production system its members and regional chapters use every day to coordinate, approve spending, sign documents, and manage membership. Not a prototype the real operational backbone.

modules.title: Membership & roster
modules.desc: A central member registry shared across chapters profiles, roles, geography, deduplication.

modules.title: Document e-signing
modules.desc: Generate, route, and sign documents by secure link; PDF generation with ID-card handling & watermarking.

modules.title: Finance & budget
modules.desc: Expense records, fund tracking, and budget approval with role- and scope-gated authority.

modules.title: Outreach CRM
modules.desc: Contact management and calling campaigns with per-contact tiers, assignments, and PDPA-aware access.

modules.title: Casework
modules.desc: Complaint and case tracking with assignment, audit trail, and public reference lookups.

modules.title: Access & identity
modules.desc: Capability-based permissions with geographic scoping, audit logging, and multi-provider login.

mapping.heading: Built multi-tenant from the ground up
mapping.lead: The exact concerns a civic-tech platform confronts are the ones this system already solves in production:

rows.me: Tenant isolation with a shared central data layer
Configurable roles, permissions & forms per org

rows.them: No shared data across the movement

experience.title: Coordinator & platform builder
experience.desc: Six years organizing and team-building for the party, grew a 5,300 member volunteer community on Discord and built the platform that runs its membership, finance, documents, and outreach.

experience.title: Farmer & programmer
experience.desc: Thirteen years of farming and study in permaculture and contemplative practice, while continuing to build software.

experience.title: Programmer
experience.desc: Web-application development and server management for a Thai social-development NGO.

experience.title: Full-stack developer & project manager
experience.desc: Programming and project management across a range of web applications.

engagement.heading: How I can help CivicFlow
engagement.text: Building platforms for organizations is my passion, and I bring a working reference implementation, not a whiteboard. I can consult on the multi-tenant data model, identity and permissions, and the document and finance workflows and stand up a running pilot on proven foundations rather than rebuilding the basics from scratch.
